title: Data Virtualization (ADLS Shortcut)
description: Read external ADLS Gen2 data in-place via a Fabric Shortcut — no copy, no ETL. Provision storage, upload sample data, create shortcut, and run analytics.
prerequisites: Azure subscription with permissions to create Storage Accounts (Storage Account Contributor or Contributor role)

azureParams.name: subscription_id
azureParams.label: Azure Subscription
azureParams.description: The Azure subscription where the ADLS Gen2 storage account will be created.

azureParams.name: resource_group
azureParams.label: Resource Group
azureParams.description: Existing resource group or name for a new one to be created.

azureParams.name: storage_account_name
azureParams.label: Storage Account Name
azureParams.description: Globally unique name (3–24 lowercase alphanumeric). Leave blank to auto-generate.

azureParams.name: azure_location
azureParams.label: Azure Region
azureParams.description: Azure region for the storage account (e.g. eastus, westeurope).
